description: A horizontal breadcrumb navigation trail showing the hierarchical path from the homepage to the current page. Used on detail and sub-section pages.

layout.structure: Single horizontal row of linked path items

FR-01.title: Path Hierarchy
FR-01.description: The breadcrumb MUST display the hierarchical path from the site root to the current page.
acceptance: Each ancestor page displayed as a link
Current page displayed as non-linked text (last item)
Example: 'Who We Are > Our Leaders > Robert A. Michael'

FR-02.title: Linked Ancestors
FR-02.description: Each ancestor path item MUST be a clickable link to that page.
acceptance: Links navigate to the respective ancestor page
Link text matches the page title

FR-03.title: Current Page Indicator
FR-03.description: The last breadcrumb item (current page) MUST NOT be a link.
acceptance: Displayed as plain text or visually muted

FR-04.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-04.description: Breadcrumb MUST remain usable on mobile.
acceptance: May truncate or wrap on narrow viewports

accessibility.AC-01: Breadcrumb MUST use <nav> element with aria-label='Breadcrumb'
accessibility.AC-02: Items MUST be in an ordered list (<ol>)
accessibility.AC-03: Current page item MUST have aria-current='page'
accessibility.AC-04: Separator characters MUST be decorative (hidden from screen readers)
